           ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM1_BASE_FRAME(0U)) ||

functions.functionContentWithoutFormatting: { return( ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM1_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM2_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM3_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM4_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM5_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM6_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM7_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM8_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM9_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM10_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM11_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM12_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM13_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM14_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM15_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM16_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM17_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == EPWM18_BASE_FRAME(0U)) ); }
{ return( ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == HRPWMCAL1_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == HRPWMCAL2_BASE_FRAME(0U)) || ((base & BASE_ADDR_MASK) == HRPWMCAL3_BASE_FRAME(0U)) ); }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(phaseCount < 0x1000000U); // // Write to TBPHS:TBPHSHR bits // HWREG(base + EPWM_O_TBPHS) = phaseCount << 8U; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(hrPhaseCount < 256U); // // Write to TBPHSHR bits // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_TBPHS) = hrPhaseCount << 8U; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(periodCount < 0x1000000U); // // Write to TBPRD:TBPRDHR bits // HWREG(base + EPWM_O_TBPRDHR) = periodCount << 8U; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(hrPeriodCount < 256U); // // Write to TBPRDHR bits // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_TBPRDHR) = hrPeriodCount << 8U; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Read from TBPRD:TBPRDHR bit // return(HWREG(base + EPWM_O_TBPRDHR) >> 8U); }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Read from TBPRDHR bit // return(HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_TBPRDHR) >> 8U); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the edge mode // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) = ((HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) & ~(0x3U << (uint16_t)channel )) | ((uint16_t)mepEdgeMode << (uint16_t)channel)); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the MEP control // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) = ((HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) & ~(0x1U << ((uint16_t)channel + 2U))) | ((uint16_t)mepCtrlMode << ((uint16_t)channel + 2U))); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the CMPAHR or CMPBHR load mode // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) = ((HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) & ~(0x3U << ((uint16_t)channel + 3U))) | ((uint16_t)loadEvent << ((uint16_t)channel + 3U))); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set output swap mode // if(enableOutputSwap) { HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) |= EPWM_HRCNFG_SWAPAB; } else { HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) &= (uint16_t)(~EPWM_HRCNFG_SWAPAB); } }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the output on ePWM B // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) & ~(EPWM_HRCNFG_SELOUTB)) | (uint16_t)(((uint16_t)outputOnB << 5U))); }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Enable MEP automatic scale // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) |= EPWM_HRCNFG_AUTOCONV; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Disable MEP automatic scale // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG) &= (uint16_t)(~EPWM_HRCNFG_AUTOCONV); }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set HRPE bit // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRPCTL) |= EPWM_HRPCTL_HRPE; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear HRPE bit // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRPCTL) &= (uint16_t)(~EPWM_HRPCTL_HRPE); }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set TBPHSHRLOADE bit // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRPCTL) |= EPWM_HRPCTL_TBPHSHRLOADE; }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear TBPHSHRLOADE bit // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRPCTL) &= (uint16_t)(~EPWM_HRPCTL_TBPHSHRLOADE); }

{ // // Set the PWMSYNC source // // // Configuration for sync pulse source equal to HRPWM_PWMSYNC_SOURCE_PERIOD // or HRPWM_PWMSYNC_SOURCE_ZERO // if(syncPulseSource < HRPWM_PWMSYNC_SOURCE_COMPC_UP) { HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRPCTL) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRPCTL) & ~(EPWM_HRPCTL_PWMSYNCSELX_M | EPWM_HRPCTL_PWMSYNCSEL)) | (uint16_t)((uint16_t)syncPulseSource << 1U)); } else { HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRPCTL) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRPCTL) & ~EPWM_HRPCTL_PWMSYNCSELX_M) | (uint16_t)((uint16_t)syncPulseSource << EPWM_HRPCTL_PWMSYNCSELX_S)); } }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(trremVal < 2048U); // // Set Translator Remainder value // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_TRREM) = (trremVal & EPWM_TRREM_TRREM_M); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(compCount < 0x1000000U); // // Write to counter compare registers // if(compModule == HRPWM_COUNTER_COMPARE_A) { // // Write to CMPA:CMPAHR // HWREG(base + EPWM_O_CMPA) = compCount << 8U; } else { // // Write to CMPB:CMPBHR // HWREG(base + EPWM_O_CMPB) = compCount << 8U; } }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(hrCompCount < 256U); // // Write to the high resolution counter compare registers // if(compModule == HRPWM_COUNTER_COMPARE_A) { // // Write to CMPAHR // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_CMPA) = hrCompCount << 8U; } else { // // Write to CMPBHR // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_CMPB) = hrCompCount << 8U; } }

{ uint32_t compCount; // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get counter compare value for selected module // if(compModule == HRPWM_COUNTER_COMPARE_A) { // // Read from CMPAHR // compCount = HWREG(base + EPWM_O_CMPA) >> 8U; } else { // // Read from CMPBHR // compCount = HWREG(base + EPWM_O_CMPB) >> 8U; } return(compCount); }

{ uint16_t hrCompCount; // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get counter compare value for selected module // if(compModule == HRPWM_COUNTER_COMPARE_A) { // // Read from CMPAHR // hrCompCount = HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_CMPA) >> 8U; } else { // // Read from CMPBHR // hrCompCount = HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_CMPB) >> 8U; } return(hrCompCount); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(redCount < 0x200000U); // // Set the consolidated RED (Rising Edge Delay) count // HWREG(base + EPWM_O_DBREDHR) = redCount << 9U; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(hrRedCount < 128U); // // Set the High Resolution RED (Rising Edge Delay) count only // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_DBREDHR) = hrRedCount << 9U; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(fedCount < 0x200000U); // // Set the High Resolution FED (Falling Edge Delay) count // HWREG(base + EPWM_O_DBFEDHR) = fedCount << 9U; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(hrFedCount < 128U); // // Set the high resolution FED (Falling Edge Delay) count // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_DBFEDHR) = hrFedCount << 9U; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWMCAL_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(mepCount < 256U); // // Set HRPWM MEP count // HWREGH(base + HRPWMCAL_O_HRMSTEP) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + HRPWMCAL_O_HRMSTEP) & ~HRPWMCAL_HRMSTEP_HRMSTEP_M) | mepCount); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the HRPWM DB edge mode // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG2) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG2) & ~EPWM_HRCNFG2_EDGMODEDB_M) | ((uint16_t)mepDBEdge)); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the HRPWM RED load mode // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG2) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG2) & ~EPWM_HRCNFG2_CTLMODEDBRED_M) | (uint16_t)((uint16_t)loadEvent << EPWM_HRCNFG2_CTLMODEDBRED_S)); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the HRPWM FED load mode // HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG2) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + EPWM_O_HRCNFG2) & ~EPWM_HRCNFG2_CTLMODEDBFED_M) | (uint16_t)((uint16_t)loadEvent << EPWM_HRCNFG2_CTLMODEDBFED_S)); }
{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(HRPWM_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write the Key to EPWMLOCK register // HWREG(base + EPWM_O_LOCK) = (uint32_t)(0xA5A50000UL | ((uint32_t)registerGroup)); }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(EPWM_isBaseValid(base)); uint32_t registerOffset; registerOffset = base + EPWM_O_XCMP + EPWM_O_XCMP1_ACTIVE + (uint32_t)xcmpReg*2U; // // Write to the XCMP registers. // HWREG(registerOffset) = xcmpValue; }

{ // // Check the arguments // ASSERT(EPWM_isBaseValid(base)); uint32_t registerOffset; registerOffset = base + EPWM_O_XCMP + EPWM_O_XCMP1_ACTIVE + (uint32_t)xcmpReg*2U; // // Write to the XCMP registers. // HWREGH(registerOffset) = (uint16_t)(hrXcmpValue); }
